rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component or implementation scope, following AADL scoping rules
Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for port-related assumptions and guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Maintain AADL architecture integrity during annex insertion
Follow AADL scoping rules for annex placement
Preserve existing component connections and subcomponents when adding annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for AGREE contract blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes for port-related contracts
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
